_publications._publicationTitle: Unbalancing cAMP and Ras/MAPK pathways as a therapeutic strategy for cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Selumetinib treatment strongly reduced cell viability in SC cultures and SC-FB cocultures with a slight effect on FB cultures. Furthermore, selumetinib elicited a potent arrest of SCs in single cultures after 48 hours
details: Strongly reduced cell viability in SC cultures and SC-FB cocultures with slight effect on FB cultures. Elicited potent arrest of SCs in single cultures after 48 hours and strong arrest of both SCs and FBs in cocultures. At high concentrations enhanced rectilinear and spindle shape morphology of SCs
